title: cyperus cymulosus
intro: Cyperus cymulosus, also known as the umbrella sedge, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus cymulosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Cyperus cymulosus is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations can be consumed as a tea or used as a poultice to promote healing and relaxation.
